nodes.text: Good evening. I have a prescription I need to fill. I'm passing through — starting a new position on Monday, three states west. My regular pharmacy is back in Whitmore.

responses.text: I'll need to see the prescription and your ID.

nodes.text: Oxycodone. Ten milligrams. Sixty tablets. Chronic back pain — workplace injury, two years ago. It's all documented on the prescription.

responses.text: Can I see the prescription and your ID?
Sixty tablets is unusual for this medication.

nodes.text: My doctor writes them that way. Two months at a time. It's a long drive back for a refill.

responses.text: I'll need to verify the prescriber details.
I understand. Let me pull up the prescriber information.
I'll run this through the system.
There's an issue with the prescriber on file.
Can you confirm your date of birth while I look this up?
The prescriber's NPI doesn't appear to be active.

nodes.text: There must be an error in the system. Dr. Rosen has been treating me for two years. I can assure you the prescription is legitimate.
